subcodes.first_line: O handmaiden of God! Your letter was received and its contents noted. A brief reply is being written [3.5s]... ...The realm of subtle entities that is alluded to referreth to the realities, specifications, individuations, capacities and potentialities of man in the mirror of the divine knowledge.
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امه الله نامه شما رسید مضمون معلوم گردید جواب مختصر مرقوم میشود عالم ذر که گفته
subcodes.subjects: @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @soul; spirit after death
